de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class BlockContractImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.BlockContractImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AuxiliaryContract, BlockContract, SpecificationElement

    public final class BlockContractImpl
extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
implements BlockContract
    Default implementation of BlockContract.
    See Also:
    BlockContractImpl.Creator

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      protected static class  BlockContractImpl.Combinator
      This class is used to to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
      static class  BlockContractImpl.Creator
      This class is used to build BlockContractImpls.

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AuxiliaryContract

        AuxiliaryContract.Terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables, AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

    • Constructor Detail

      • BlockContractImpl

        public BlockContractImpl(java.lang.String baseName,
                         StatementBlock block,
                         java.util.List<Label> labels,
                         IProgramMethod method,
                         Modality modality,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> preconditions,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePreconditions,
                         Term measuredBy,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> postconditions,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePostconditions,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> modifiesClauses,
                         ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs,
                         AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables,
                         boolean transactionApplicable,
                         java.util.Map<LocationVariable,java.lang.Boolean> hasMod,
                         ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> functionalContracts)
        Parameters:
        baseName - the base name.
        block - the block this contract belongs to.
        labels - all labels belonging to the block.
        method - the method containing the block.
        modality - this contract's modality.
        preconditions - this contract's preconditions on every heap.
        measuredBy - this contract's measured-by term.
        postconditions - this contract's postconditions on every heap.
        modifiesClauses - this contract's modifies clauses on every heap.
        infFlowSpecs - this contract's information flow specifications.
        variables - this contract's variables.
        transactionApplicable - whether or not this contract is applicable for transactions.
        hasMod - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a modified clause.
        functionalContracts - the functional contracts corresponding to this contract.

    • Method Detail

      • combine

        public static BlockContract combine(ImmutableSet<BlockContract> contracts,
                                    Services services)
        Parameters:
        contracts - a set of block contracts to combine.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the combination of the specified block contracts.

        public LoopContract toLoopContract()
        Specified by:
        toLoopContract in interface BlockContract
        Returns:
        the LoopContract from which this contract was generated, or null.
        See Also:
        LoopContract.toBlockContract()

      • map

        public BlockContract map(java.util.function.UnaryOperator<Term> op,
                         Services services)
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
        Specified by:
        map in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Specified by:
        map in interface BlockContract
        Specified by:
        map in interface SpecificationElement
        Parameters:
        op - the operator to apply.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        this specification element with the operator applied.

      • update

        public BlockContract update(StatementBlock newBlock,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPreconditions,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePreconditions,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> newPostconditions,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> newFreePostconditions,
                            java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> newModifiesClauses,
                            ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> newinfFlowSpecs,
                            AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables,
                            Term newMeasuredBy)
        Specified by:
        update in interface BlockContract
        Parameters:
        newBlock - the new block.
        newPreconditions - the new preconditions.
        newPostconditions - the new postconditions.
        newModifiesClauses - the new modifies clauses.
        newinfFlowSpecs - the new information flow specifications.
        newVariables - the new variables.
        newMeasuredBy - the new measured-by clause.
        Returns:
        a new block contract with the specified attributes.

      • setBlock

        public BlockContract setBlock(StatementBlock newBlock)
        Specified by:
        setBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
        Specified by:
        setBlock in interface BlockContract
        Parameters:
        newBlock - the new block.
        Returns:
        a new block contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different block.

        setTarget in interface BlockContract
        Parameters:

        Returns:
        a new block contract equal to this one except that it belongs to a different target.
